notes: Market-neutral monthly XTI/XNG momentum-carry double screen from approved card FMR-MOMTS-2010_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; rank synchronized last-completed-month log returns and broker long-minus-short swap differentials independently, trade only on rank agreement, and evaluate the logical basket rather than standalone legs. The .DWX tester exposes zero swap, so the locked Q02 setfile uses a predeclared +1 carry rank while still requiring independent one-month momentum agreement.
